title: Toji and Kaworu interactions
wikitext:
[]: Toji and Kaworu interactions             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Fri Mar 08, 2013 2:00 am I heard that in the Eva2 game, Toji and Kaworu don't get along very well, mostly on Toji's end. Why? Is Toji homophobic? Is he racist or suspicious on Kaworu being an angel(one of the stories involve Kaworu joining Nerv full time after his attack). Do they bicker at each other like he dose with Asuka? I'm just curious really since we never see the 2 together often and Eva2 seems to show more content. I recall he seems fine with Kaworu's sexuality in Gos2. He's disgusted at Kaworu forcing Shinji to kill him after befriending him in one of those crossover games. That and he defends Kaworu when he speaks ill of Asuka in that radio drama thing. So how do they not get along in that game?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Mar 08, 2013 10:18 am I'd think it's just Touji being very insistent on his personal space. XD

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 08, 2013 2:45 pm Where'd you "hear" this, SimplyMason? I haven't played in a while, so I can't remember much. Don't think Toji will have any particularly interesting comments for Kaworu in particular; you can probably count the dialogue that's unique between two characters on one hand.

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Fri Mar 08, 2013 5:44 pm Reichu wrote: Where'd you "hear" this, SimplyMason? I haven't played in a while, so I can't remember much. Don't think Toji will have any particularly interesting comments for Kaworu in particular; you can probably count the dialogue that's unique between two characters on one hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Mar 08, 2013 6:34 pm It's from this revision , with the notes: I got Lleonard's premission to use stuff from his walkthrough a while back. Sounds like it was taken from Lleonard's walkthrough.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 08, 2013 6:40 pm I guess it could be referring to the default status of their relationship grids [PSP version]. Too lazy to check right now, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Mar 09, 2013 12:38 am I think I already owned both PS2 and PSP NGE2 when I wrote that revision. There was one flirting comment from Kaworu to Toji after the Ritsuko defeats Ireul event. Can't remember anything else right now, but maybe it is their default relationship status in the PSP version.

[]: Re: Toji and Kaworu interactions             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Mar 14, 2013 5:06 am SimplyMason0 wrote: I heard that in the Eva2 game, Toji and Kaworu don't get along very well, mostly on Toji's end.

[]:             Quote Post by Ambrosia » Wed Mar 20, 2013 10:58 am When I played Touji's scenario he and Kaworu were friendly enough, without my going the extra mile to make them that way.

Article: Toji and Kaworu interactions
[]: Toji and Kaworu interactions             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Fri Mar 08, 2013 2:00 am I heard that in the Eva2 game, Toji and Kaworu don't get along very well, mostly on Toji's end. Why? Is Toji homophobic? Is he racist or suspicious on Kaworu being an angel(one of the stories involve Kaworu joining Nerv full time after his attack). Do they bicker at each other like he dose with Asuka? I'm just curious really since we never see the 2 together often and Eva2 seems to show more content. I recall he seems fine with Kaworu's sexuality in Gos2. He's disgusted at Kaworu forcing Shinji to kill him after befriending him in one of those crossover games. That and he defends Kaworu when he speaks ill of Asuka in that radio drama thing. So how do they not get along in that game?
